description_en: Phnom Penh may not be a Muslim-majority destination, but it welcomes Muslim travelers with real halal options. You'll find 15 halal restaurants and 12 mosques nearby, plus real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — everything to explore Phnom Penh, Cambodia, with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Phnom Penh: 33 halal restaurants listed, 12 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 3.2/5.
